state.description: Current board configuration and player to move

fields.board: list of 8 rows, each a list of 8 atoms: empty | black | white. Row 1=top, Col 1=left.
fields.current_player: atom, black | white, the player to move

move.description: Place a piece of current_player's color or pass if no placements are legal

legal_move_conditions: If action = place, cell at (row,col) is empty
If action = place, there exists at least one of the eight directions where a contiguous line of opponent pieces is immediately followed by a current_player piece
If action = pass, no legal place moves exist for current_player
If there is at least one legal place move for current_player, action must be place
apply_move_effects: If action = place, set board[row][col] = current_player
If action = place, for each direction with a contiguous line of opponent pieces ending in current_player, flip all those opponent pieces
turn_order: Players alternate turns; a pass is still a turn; if both players have no legal moves, game ends
win_conditions: At game end, the player with more pieces on the board wins
draw_conditions: At game end, both players have an equal number of pieces
end_conditions: Neither player has a legal place move
